reviews.comment:

Everything is ridiculously expensive... the staff are unhelpful... they just try to squeeze money out of you. A disaster.

reviews.comment:
No se si hay una estación de servicio más lenta que esta. Sin están apurados ni se acérquen. Son todos viejos que se toman 30 minutos por auto aunque no haya nadie tardas 1 hora

(Translated by Google)
I don't know if there's a gas station slower than this one. If you're in a hurry, don't even bother. They're all old guys who take 30 minutes per car, and even if there's no one else around, it takes an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1OGN2QzJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ayer 25/11 fuimos a la tarde con mi marido y las nenas, muy buena atención de una chica jovencita, muy atenta, con una sonrisa nos atendió.
El Café que nos hizo quedó hermoso con un dibujo, se ve que le pone onda. Al fin mejoraron el café, los felicito.

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, November 25th, my husband, our daughters, and I went in the afternoon. A young woman served us very well; she was very attentive and always had a smile.
The coffee she made was beautiful, with a little drawing on it—you can tell she puts a lot of effort into it. They've finally improved their coffee; congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQbGZLc2pnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención el turno noche , llegamos a la estación (10:45 hs del día 24/11) no nos quiso atender con Ypf ruta , no estaban habilitados los baños ni de mujer ni de hombre porque el empleado de mantenimiento se lleva la llave a las 22 cuando termina su turno, solo dejan el baño de discapacitados y está sucio

No es recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the night shift. We arrived at the station (10:45 AM on November 24) and they refused to serve us with the YPF route. Neither the men's nor the women's restrooms were open because the maintenance employee takes the key at 10 PM when his shift ends. They only leave the accessible restroom, and it's dirty.

Not recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQZ1puOUhBEAE
